entries.value: Raberto: Are you sure? You're going to face the boss without spending your tokens...
Hey there, rookie! Welcome to Pizzard's Pizza Academy!
I'm Raberto, your guide. And cheese-istant.
Your quest, should you choose to accept it, is to defeat the four Pizza Overlords.
Do so, and the Legendary Pizza Recipe of Pizzard himself shall be yours!
You'll use that magic wand to cast elemental spells. Try mixing and matching ingredients!
Now, head into my shop. Spend some of those shiny tokens I gave you.
Raberto: Watch out! Hec'kiel, the Dragon of Dough, breathes cheesy fire!
Raberto: He's all about that elemental power. Show him what you've learned!
Raberto: Next up is Pomodoro, the Infernal Oven!
Raberto: It's gonna get hot in here. Don't get burned!
Raberto: This is Niggel. He's... a very picky, very rich customer.
Raberto: His attacks are unpredictable and frankly, quite insulting. Don't let him get to you!
Raberto: This is it! The final test! P'blob, the Primordial Pizza Slime!
Raberto: It's a bubbling monstrosity of all ingredients combined! Give it everything you've got!
Raberto: You did it! You toasted that dragon!
Raberto: One step closer to the legendary recipe. But the challenges only get hotter from here.
Raberto: Back to the shop to power up!
Raberto: Woohoo! You shut down the oven for good!
Raberto: You're getting pretty good at this pizza-making... er, I mean, pizza-fighting!
Raberto: Don't get cocky though, the next one's a weird one.
Raberto: The customer is NOT always right! You showed him!
Raberto: Just one more to go! The final boss of this culinary academy!
Raberto: This is your final chance to prepare. Make it count!
Raberto: YOU ARE A PIZZA WIZARD!
Raberto: You've done it! You've mastered all the challenges Pizzard's has to offer!
Raberto: The Legendary Pizza Recipe is... well, it's more of a metaphor. The real recipe was the friends we made along the way.
Raberto: Oof, that looked like it hurt.
Raberto: Don't worry, every great chef burns a pizza now and then. Go spend your tokens and try again!
